title: lithospermum revolutum
intro: Lithospermum revolutum, also known as Chinese gromwell, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family. The medicinal properties of Lithospermum revolutum lie in its roots, which are rich in alkaloids, particularly lithospermic acid, that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential in treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Lithospermum revolutum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, and can be found in some traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
